Index.title: Make commitments that stick
Index.description: PactChain lets groups create binding social commitments backed by USDC on Stellar. Winners get paid automatically — no middleman.

trustless.title: Trustless escrow
trustless.desc: USDC locked in a Soroban smart contract on Stellar testnet.

resolution.title: 3 resolution modes
resolution.desc: Majority vote, single judge, or full unanimity — your choice.

payout.title: Auto-payout
payout.desc: Winner receives funds instantly. 2% fee funds the protocol treasury.

Create.title: Create a Pact

labels.title: Title
labels.voteOptionsHint: Define how participants vote on the outcome.

placeholders.title: Who will finish the 30-day challenge?
placeholders.description: What exactly are participants committing to?

UNANIMITY.label: Unanimity
UNANIMITY.desc: All participants must agree (or get refunded)

errors.deadlineFuture: Deadline must be in the future

deadline.hint: Select a quick preset or pick a custom date.

Create.success: Pact created! Share the invite link.

Join.disclaimer: By joining, you agree to stake {stake} USDC. Funds are held in a Soroban smart contract and released to the winner(s) after resolution.

JoinDemo.demoDisclaimer: This is a demo pact. No real USDC will be staked. Use it to explore the PactChain join flow before connecting your wallet.
JoinDemo.noWalletNeeded: No wallet needed — this is a simulated experience.
JoinDemo.successDesc: In a real pact, your USDC would now be locked in a Soroban smart contract on Stellar.
JoinDemo.demoNote: No funds were moved. This was a demo.

Dashboard.lockedSuccess: Pact locked! Voting is now open.

Vote.title: Cast Your Vote
Vote.description: Select who you think won the commitment challenge. You cannot vote for yourself.

Result.refundedDesc: No unanimity was reached within 48 hours. All participants have been refunded.
Result.npsQuestion: How likely are you to use PactChain again? (1–10)
